_comment: Copy to data/settings.json and fill in. data/settings.json is gitignored: it names real people and real paths, and nothing personal belongs in the repository.
_document_type: The Paperless document_type every ingested file is filed under.
_master_sheet: Optional. A pre-existing spreadsheet of hand-tracked results, used to seed the analyte codebook and as the extractor's golden test. Leave master_sheet_id empty if you have none -- everything still works, you just have no ground truth to check the extractor against.
_paperless_viewer: The URL you open Paperless at in a BROWSER (may differ from the API url, e.g. behind a reverse proxy). Used for clickable links in review worksheets.
